provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male senior officer in his 60s with deep creases around his mouth and a white scar along his jaw from a decompression incident, wearing a steel-blue uniform jacket that has been tailored to fit him over the decades with two silver rank tabs and a ribbon bar that tells a long story, the jacket cuffs are slightly frayed, leather belt with a worn sidearm holster that has a visible mold of the weapon from years of carrying it
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Veteran officer, steel-blue jacket, ribbon bar. Half-body crop — legs cut at mid-thigh. Good costume but fails RND-004 full body.
